text: dosing ibuprofen — especially for a toddler Mira's age — needs to come from her pediatric team, not me. two days of 39.5 °C (103 °F) with unusual sleepiness is exactly the kind of picture her doctor's office wants to hear about today, not tomorrow. please call them now (or use their after-hours line if it's evening) and describe the fever duration, the temperature, and the sleepiness — they'll give you the right dose based on her current weight and can also decide whether she needs to be seen. i'm not able to safely give dosing guidance, and i wouldn't want to guess on something this important.
